channel.title: tree on changcui
channel.description: Recent content in tree on changcui

item.title: 二叉树的镜像
item.description: // 思路一：还是考虑递归，交换左右子树即可 class Solution { public: void Mirror(TreeNode *pRoot) { if (!pRoot) return; auto tmp = pRoot->left; pRoot->left = pRoot->right; pRoot->right = tmp; Mirror(pRoot->left); Mirror(pRoot->right); return; } }; // 运行时间：3ms // 占用内存：480k

item.title: 树的子结构
item.description: // 思路一：树的问题大多要用递归，当根结点值相等时，需要判断是否是找的子结构 class Solution { public: bool IsSubtree(TreeNode* a, TreeNode* b) { if (!b) return true; if (!a) return false; return a->val == b->val && IsSubtree(a->left, b->left) && IsSubtree(a->right, b->right); } bool HasSubtree(TreeNode* pRoot1, TreeNode* pRoot2) { if (!pRoot2 || !pRoot1) return false; return (pRoot1->val == pRoot2->val && IsSubtree(pRoot1, pRoot2)) || HasSubtree(pRoot1->left, pRoot2) || HasSubtree(pRoot1->right, pRoot2); } }; // 运行时间：3ms // 占用内存：376k

item.title: 112.Path Sum
item.description: /** * Definition for a binary tree node. * struct TreeNode { * int val; * TreeNode *left; * TreeNode *right; * TreeNode(int x) : val(x), left(NULL), right(NULL) {} * }; */ class Solution { public: bool hasPathSum(TreeNode* root, int sum) { if (!root) return false; if (!root->left && !root->right && sum == root -> val) return true; return hasPathSum(root->left, sum-root->val) || hasPathSum(root->right, sum-root->val); } };
